prompt: Add the shopping list from Weekend Meal Plan to my reminders

assertions.description: Reads the Weekend Meal Plan wiki page via obsidian read
Extracts items from the Shopping List section (should be ~8-9 items from the Weekend page)
Checks existing Shopping list for duplicates before adding
Correctly identifies and skips items already on the Shopping list (majority should be duplicates)
Only adds items that are not already on the list
Notes near-duplicates like 'green lentils' vs 'Green/brown/Puy lentils'
Provides a clear summary with counts of added, skipped, and total items
